CONTENT.Career: A former youth academy player of Savigny-le-Temple, Bitumazala joined the Paris Saint-Germain Academy in 2015. He signed his first professional contract on 3 September 2020, tying him to the club until June 2023. On 14 July 2021, he made his first appearance for the senior team in a 4–0 friendly win over Le Mans. His competitive debut came on 11 September 2021, as he came on as a substitute in a 4–0 Ligue 1 win over Clermont.On 17 August 2022, Bitumazala joined Eupen on a four-year deal until June 2026.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Bitumazala is of DR Congolese descent.
CONTENT.External links: Nathan Bitumazala at WorldFootball.netNathan Bitumazala – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French

SUMMARY: Nathan Bitumazala (born 10 December 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Belgian Pro League club Eupen.
